cards.style: flat background, 1px solid border-border, sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm)
cards.hover: glow effect using box-shadow with primary color

buttons.primary: bg-yellow-400 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-yellow-500 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors

tournaments_table.style: dense layout, control room bento grid or sleek dark table, sticky headers, text-sm for data, yellow highlights for active/current events

ui_patterns.hero_overlay: bg-black/60 to ensure text readability over the court image, with a gradient fade at the bottom

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing pages as per rules, using Shadcn only for interactive logic if required.
Do NOT use 'Inter'. Import 'Barlow Condensed' for headings and 'DM Sans' for body from Google Fonts.
Implement the 'DOMINATE THE COURT' heading in Barlow Condensed 900, text-5xl to text-7xl fluid typography.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link').
For the Tournaments section, design a responsive data grid or stylized table showing ~85 rows. Ensure it's scanable and utilizes the 'Control Room' grid archetype.
The Coach page should be split layout on desktop (image one side, text other), stacked on mobile.
